mapper.select: SELECT A.PR_BUYER_CD, A.PR_DEPT_CD, A.PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM ,A.PURCHASE_TYPE ,A.ITEM_CD, A.ITEM_DESC, A.ITEM_SPEC, A.MAKER_CD, A.MAKER_ART_NO, A.ORIGIN_CD ,A.PR_QT, A.UNIT_CD, A.UNIT_PRC, A.PR_AMT, A.DUE_DATE ,A.PR_NUM, A.PR_SQ ,A.BUYER_CD, A.BID_NUM, A.BID_CNT, A.ITEM_SQ, A.PB_BUYER_CD FROM ( SELECT DT.PR_BUYER_CD ,DT.PR_DEPT_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(DT.GATE_CD, DT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) ' ' GETDEPTNAME(DT.GATE_CD, DT.PR_BUYER_CD, DT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM ,DT.PURCHASE_TYPE ,DT.ITEM_CD ,DT.ITEM_DESC ,DT.ITEM_SPEC ,DT.MAKER_CD ,GETMKBRNAME(DT.GATE_CD, DT.BUYER_CD, 'MK', DT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM ,DT.MAKER_PART_NO AS MAKER_ART_NO ,DT.ORIGIN_CD ,DT.PR_QT ,DT.UNIT_CD ,DT.UNIT_PRC ,DT.PR_AMT ,(DT.DUE_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS DUE_DATE ,DT.PR_NUM ,DT.PR_SQ ,DT.EC_BUYER_CD AS BUYER_CD ,'' AS BID_NUM ,'' AS BID_CNT ,'' AS ITEM_SQ ,DT.BUYER_CD AS PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCPRDT DT WHERE DT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND DT.EC_BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND DT.PR_BUYER_CD DT.PR_NUM DT.PR_SQ IN ${paramPrNumSq} AND DT.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A ORDER BY A.PR_BUYER_CD , A.PR_DEPT_CD , A.PR_NUM , A.PR_SQ

SELECT A.PR_BUYER_CD, A.PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM, A.BUYER_CD, A.PURCHASE_TYPE ,A.ITEM_CD, A.ITEM_DESC, A.ITEM_SPEC, A.MAKER_CD, A.MAKER_ART_NO, A.ORIGIN_CD ,A.PR_QT, A.UNIT_CD, A.UNIT_PRC, A.PR_AMT ,A.PR_NUM, A.PR_SQ, A.BID_NUM, A.BID_CNT, A.ITEM_SQ ,A.DUE_DATE, A.PR_DEPT_CD, A.PB_BUYER_CD FROM ( SELECT DT.PR_BUYER_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(DT.GATE_CD, DT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) ' ' GETDEPTNAME(DT.GATE_CD, DT.PR_BUYER_CD, DT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM ,DT.BUYER_CD ,DT.PURCHASE_TYPE ,DT.ITEM_CD ,DT.ITEM_DESC ,DT.ITEM_SPEC ,DT.MAKER_CD ,GETMKBRNAME(DT.GATE_CD, DT.BUYER_CD, 'MK', DT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM ,DT.MAKER_ART_NO ,DT.ORIGIN_CD ,DT.PR_QT ,DT.UNIT_CD ,DT.UNIT_PRC ,DT.PR_AMT ,DT.PR_NUM ,DT.PR_SQ ,DT.BID_NUM ,DT.BID_CNT ,DT.ITEM_SQ ,(DT.DUE_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS DUE_DATE ,DT.PR_DEPT_CD ,DT.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCBDDT DT WHERE DT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND DT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND DT.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND DT.BID_CNT = (CASE WHEN (#{baseDataType} = 'ModBID' OR #{baseDataType} = 'ReBID') THEN #{ORI_BID_CNT} ELSE #{BID_CNT} END) AND DT.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A ORDER BY A.ITEM_SQ

SELECT BDEU.EU_TYPE ,BDEU.EU_USER_ID ,BDEU.EU_USER_NM AS EU_USER_NM ,BDEU.EU_EMAIL AS EU_EMAIL ,BDEU.EU_PHONE_NUM AS EU_PHONE_NUM ,BDEU.BUYER_CD ,BDEU.EI_NUM ,BDEU.EU_SQ ,BDEU.PROGRESS_CD ,(SELECT MAX(E.PROGRESS_CD) FROM STOCBDEU E WHERE E.GATE_CD = BDEU.GATE_CD AND E.BUYER_CD = BDEU.BUYER_CD AND E.EI_NUM = BDEU.EI_NUM AND E.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS MAX_PROGRESS_CD FROM STOCBDEU BDEU WHERE BDEU.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BDEU.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BDEU.EI_NUM = #{EI_NUM} AND BDEU.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY BDEU.EU_SQ
mapper.insert: MERGE STOCBDPG BDPG USING (SELECT #{ses.gateCd} AS GATE_CD ,#{BUYER_CD} AS BUYER_CD ,#{BID_NUM} AS BID_NUM ,#{BID_CNT} AS BID_CNT ,#{VOTE_CNT} AS VOTE_CNT ) B ON (BDPG.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND BDPG.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD AND BDPG.BID_NUM = B.BID_NUM AND BDPG.BID_CNT = B.BID_CNT AND BDPG.VOTE_CNT = B.VOTE_CNT) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET MOD_DATE = SYSDATE ,MOD_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} ,BID_BEGIN_DATE = #{BID_BEGIN_DATE} ,BID_BEGIN_TIME = #{BID_BEGIN_TIME} #{BID_BEGIN_MIN} '00' ,BID_END_DATE = #{BID_END_DATE} ,BID_END_TIME = #{BID_END_TIME} #{BID_END_MIN} '00' ,OPEN_DATE = #{OPEN_DATE} ,OPEN_TIME = #{OPEN_TIME} #{OPEN_MIN} '00' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GATE_CD ,BUYER_CD ,BID_NUM ,BID_CNT ,VOTE_CNT ,REG_DATE ,REG_USER_ID ,MOD_DATE ,MOD_USER_ID ,DEL_FLAG ,BID_BEGIN_DATE ,BID_BEGIN_TIME ,BID_END_DATE ,BID_END_TIME ,OPEN_DATE ,OPEN_TIME ) VALUES ( #{ses.gateCd} ,#{BUYER_CD} ,#{BID_NUM} ,#{BID_CNT} ,#{VOTE_CNT} ,SYSDATE ,#{ses.userId} ,SYSDATE ,#{ses.userId} ,'0' ,#{BID_BEGIN_DATE} ,#{BID_BEGIN_TIME} #{BID_BEGIN_MIN} '00' ,#{BID_END_DATE} ,#{BID_END_TIME} #{BID_END_MIN} '00' ,#{OPEN_DATE} ,#{OPEN_TIME} #{OPEN_MIN} '00' )
mapper.select: SELECT HD.ANN_NO ,HD.ANN_ITEM ,HD.BUYER_CD ,CASE WHEN HD.ESTM_OPEN_FLAG = '1' THEN CASE WHEN CONT_TYPE2 = 'QE' THEN TO_CHAR(HD.BASIC_AMT, 'FM999,999,999,999,999') ELSE TO_CHAR(HD.PR_AMT, 'FM999,999,999,999,999') END '원' '(' GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M100', HD.VAT_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) ')' ELSE '비공개' END AS PR_AMT ,CASE WHEN HD.ESTM_OPEN_FLAG = '1' THEN TO_CHAR(HD.BASIC_AMT, 'FM999,999,999,999,999') '원' '(' GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M100', HD.VAT_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) ')' ELSE '비공개' END AS BASIC_AMT ,CASE WHEN HD.BID_CNT != '1' THEN '여 (관련공고 :' (SELECT ANN_NO FROM STOCBDHD WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT - 1) ')' ELSE '부' END RE_BID_YN , GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M301', HD.CONT_TYPE1, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE1_LOC , GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M302', HD.CONT_TYPE2, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE2_LOC ,CASE WHEN HD.CONT_TYPE3 = 'TA' THEN GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M303', HD.CONT_TYPE3, 0, #{ses.langCd}) CASE WHEN HD.TCO_FLAG = '1' THEN '(' HD.TCO_YEAR_CNT '년 TCO' ')' ELSE ' ' END ELSE GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M303', HD.CONT_TYPE3, 0, #{ses.langCd}) END CONT_TYPE3_LOC ,HD.VOTE_LIMIT_CNT ,HD.APP_PLACE ,CASE WHEN HD.DIFF_GUAR_FLAG = '1' THEN '여' ELSE '부' END DIFF_GUAR_FLAG , GETCOMPANYNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS CUST_NM ,(SELECT listagg(PR_BUYER_CD,',') WITHIN GROUP (order by PR_BUYER_CD) AS REF_USER_ID FROM (SELECT DISTINCT GETCOMPANYNAME(GATE_CD, PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) PR_BUYER_CD FROM STOCBDDT WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0') ) PR_BUYER_CD ,(SELECT listagg(PR_BUYER_CD,',') WITHIN GROUP (order by PR_BUYER_CD) AS REF_USER_ID FROM (SELECT DISTINCT PR_BUYER_CD FROM STOCBDDT WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0') ) REF_BUYER_CD ,HD.CONT_TERM ,HD.FINA_SOLV_FLAG ,HD.ESTM_LIMIT_RATE ,HD.RATE_SDEPT ,HD.RATE_CURR ,HD.TECH_SCORE ,HD.PRC_SCORE ,HD.MIN_TECH_SCORE ,HD.MIN_TOT_SCORE ,HD.CONF_STD_SCORE ,HD.SB_LIMIT_RATE ,(CASE WHEN (HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND HD.APP_BEGIN_TIME IS NOT NULL) THEN (TO_DATE(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE HD.APP_BEGIN_TIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') ELSE '' END) AS APP_BEGIN ,(CASE WHEN (HD.APP_END_DATE IS NOT NULL AND HD.APP_END_TIME IS NOT NULL) THEN (TO_DATE(HD.APP_END_DATE HD.APP_END_TIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') ELSE '' END) AS APP_END ,(CASE WHEN (PG.BID_BEGIN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND PG.BID_BEGIN_TIME IS NOT NULL) THEN (TO_DATE(PG.BID_BEGIN_DATE PG.BID_BEGIN_TIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') ELSE '' END) AS BID_BEGIN ,(CASE WHEN (PG.BID_END_DATE IS NOT NULL AND PG.BID_END_TIME IS NOT NULL) THEN (TO_DATE(PG.BID_END_DATE PG.BID_END_TIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') ELSE '' END) AS BID_END ,(CASE WHEN (PG.OPEN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND PG.OPEN_TIME IS NOT NULL) THEN (TO_DATE(PG.OPEN_DATE PG.OPEN_TIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') ELSE '' END) AS OPENTIME ,HD.ANNO_OPEN_FLAG ,CASE WHEN HD.ANNO_FLAG = '1' THEN '여' ELSE '부' END ANNO_FLAG ,CASE WHEN HD.ANNO_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(HD.ANNO_DATE HD.ANNO_TIME_FROM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') ELSE '' END ANNO_DATE ,HD.ANNO_PLACE ,HD.ANNO_NOTIFIER ,HD.ANNO_RESP ,HD.ANNO_RMK ,HD.PROP_OPEN_FLAG ,CASE WHEN HD.PROP_FLAG = '1' THEN '여' ELSE '부' END PROP_FLAG ,CASE WHEN HD.PROP_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(HD.PROP_DATE HD.PROP_TIME_FROM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') ELSE '' END PROP_DATE ,HD.PROP_PLACE ,HD.PROP_NOTIFIER ,HD.PROP_RESP ,HD.PROP_RMK ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = HD.BUYER_CD) IRS_NUM ,HD.APP_ETC ,(SELECT listagg(REAL_FILE_NM,',') WITHIN GROUP (order by REAL_FILE_NM) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND UUID = HD.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') ATT_FILE_NMS ,HD.ATT_FILE_NUM ,HD.ANN_DATE ,(CASE WHEN HD.ANN_DATE < '20230914' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS ANN_TO_DATE ,(SELECT GETCOMPANYNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.COMPANY_CD, #{ses.langCd}) ' ' GETDEPTNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.COMPANY_CD, A.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) ' ' A.DUTY_NM ' ' (A.USER_NM) ' ' '(' (TEL_NUM) ')' BID_USER_TEXT FROM STOCCVUR A WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = HD.BID_USER_ID) BID_USER_TEXT ,(SELECT GETCOMPANYNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.COMPANY_CD, #{ses.langCd}) ' ' GETDEPTNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.COMPANY_CD, A.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) ' ' A.DUTY_NM FROM STOCCVUR A WHERE GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = HD.BID_USER_ID) BID_USER_TEXT2 ,(SELECT listagg( GETCOMPANYNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.COMPANY_CD, #{ses.langCd}) ' ' GETDEPTNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.COMPANY_CD, A.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) ' ' A.DUTY_NM ' ' (A.USER_NM) ' ' '(' (TEL_NUM) ')' ,'MAKEBR') WITHIN GROUP (order by A.USER_NM) FROM STOCCVUR A WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND USER_ID IN (SELECT REG_USER_ID FROM STOCPRHD WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND (BUYER_CD,PR_NUM) IN (SELECT DISTINCT PB_BUYER_CD, PR_NUM FROM STOCBDDT B WHERE B.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND B.BUYER_CD = #{buyerCd} AND B.BID_NUM = #{bidNum} AND B.BID_CNT = #{bidCnt} AND B.DEL_FLAG = '0')) ) PR_USER_TEXT ,HD.CANCEL_RMK ,(SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 1 THEN MAX(ITEM_DESC) ELSE MAX(ITEM_DESC) ' 외' (COUNT(*) -1) '건' END FROM STOCBDDT B WHERE B.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND B.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND B.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND B.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND B.DEL_FLAG = '0') ITEM_TEXT ,HD.CONT_TYPE1 ,HD.CONT_TYPE2 ,HD.CONT_TYPE3 ,HD.LIMIT_CRIT FROM STOCBDHD HD LEFT JOIN STOCBDPG PG ON (HD.GATE_CD = PG.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = PG.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = PG.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = PG.BID_CNT -- 2021.06.24 : 입찰공고의 입찰서제출 및 개찰시간 = 투찰차수 1차의 기간으로 한다. AND PG.VOTE_CNT = (SELECT MIN(P.VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDPG P WHERE P.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND P.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND P.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND P.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND P.DEL_FLAG = '0')) WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{buyerCd} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{bidNum} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{bidCnt}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCBDHD ( GATE_CD ,BUYER_CD ,BID_NUM ,BID_CNT ,REG_DATE ,REG_USER_ID ,MOD_DATE ,MOD_USER_ID ,DEL_FLAG ,DEPT_CD ,ANN_NO ,ANN_DATE ,ANN_ITEM ,CONT_TYPE1 ,CONT_TYPE2 ,CONT_TYPE3 ,TCO_FLAG ,TCO_YEAR_CNT ,CUR ,PR_AMT ,VAT_TYPE ,ESTM_OPEN_FLAG ,FINA_SOLV_FLAG ,ESTM_LIMIT_RATE ,RATE_SDEPT ,RATE_CURR ,DIFF_GUAR_FLAG ,TECH_SCORE ,PRC_SCORE ,MIN_TECH_SCORE ,MIN_TOT_SCORE ,BASIC_AMT ,CONF_STD_SCORE ,SB_LIMIT_RATE ,CONT_TERM ,VOTE_LIMIT_CNT ,APP_BEGIN_DATE ,APP_BEGIN_TIME ,APP_END_DATE ,APP_END_TIME ,APP_PLACE ,ESTM_TYPE ,LIMIT_CRIT ,PROM_CRIT ,BID_USER_ID ,ESTM_USER_ID ,OPEN_USER_ID ,TECH_EV_TYPE ,EV_USER_ID ,EV_TPL_NUM ,EI_NUM ,APP_ETC ,ATT_FILE_NUM ,ANNO_OPEN_FLAG ,ANNO_FLAG ,ANNO_DATE ,ANNO_TIME_FROM ,ANNO_TIME_TO ,ANNO_PLACE ,ANNO_NOTIFIER ,ANNO_RESP ,ANNO_RMK ,PROP_OPEN_FLAG ,PROP_FLAG ,PROP_DATE ,PROP_TIME_FROM ,PROP_TIME_TO ,PROP_PLACE ,PROP_NOTIFIER ,PROP_RESP ,PROP_RMK ,CANCEL_RMK ,SIGN_STATUS ,BID_STATUS ) SELECT GATE_CD ,BUYER_CD ,BID_NUM ,TO_NUMBER(#{BID_CNT}) AS BID_CNT ,SYSDATE AS REG_DATE ,#{ses.userId} AS REG_USER_ID ,SYSDATE AS MOD_DATE ,#{ses.userId} AS MOD_USER_ID ,'0' AS DEL_FLAG ,DEPT_CD ,ANN_NO ,ANN_DATE ,ANN_ITEM ,CONT_TYPE1 ,CONT_TYPE2 ,CONT_TYPE3 ,TCO_FLAG ,TCO_YEAR_CNT ,CUR ,PR_AMT ,VAT_TYPE ,ESTM_OPEN_FLAG ,FINA_SOLV_FLAG ,ESTM_LIMIT_RATE ,RATE_SDEPT ,RATE_CURR ,DIFF_GUAR_FLAG ,TECH_SCORE ,PRC_SCORE ,MIN_TECH_SCORE ,MIN_TOT_SCORE ,BASIC_AMT ,CONF_STD_SCORE ,SB_LIMIT_RATE ,CONT_TERM ,VOTE_LIMIT_CNT ,APP_BEGIN_DATE ,APP_BEGIN_TIME ,APP_END_DATE ,APP_END_TIME ,APP_PLACE ,ESTM_TYPE ,LIMIT_CRIT ,PROM_CRIT ,BID_USER_ID ,ESTM_USER_ID ,OPEN_USER_ID ,TECH_EV_TYPE ,EV_USER_ID ,EV_TPL_NUM ,EI_NUM ,APP_ETC ,ATT_FILE_NUM ,ANNO_OPEN_FLAG ,ANNO_FLAG ,ANNO_DATE ,ANNO_TIME_FROM ,ANNO_TIME_TO ,ANNO_PLACE ,ANNO_NOTIFIER ,ANNO_RESP ,ANNO_RMK ,PROP_OPEN_FLAG ,PROP_FLAG ,PROP_DATE ,PROP_TIME_FROM ,PROP_TIME_TO ,PROP_PLACE ,PROP_NOTIFIER ,PROP_RESP ,PROP_RMK ,#{CANCEL_RMK_NUM} AS CANCEL_RMK ,#{SIGN_STATUS} AS SIGN_STATUS ,#{BID_STATUS} AS BID_STATUS FROM STOCBDHD WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND BID_CNT = #{ORI_BID_CNT}

INSERT INTO STOCBDDT ( GATE_CD ,BUYER_CD ,BID_NUM ,BID_CNT ,ITEM_SQ ,REG_DATE ,REG_USER_ID ,MOD_DATE ,MOD_USER_ID ,DEL_FLAG ,PR_BUYER_CD ,PR_DEPT_CD ,PURCHASE_TYPE ,ITEM_CD ,ITEM_DESC ,ITEM_SPEC ,MAKER_CD ,MAKER_ART_NO ,ORIGIN_CD ,PR_QT ,UNIT_CD ,UNIT_PRC ,PR_AMT ,TCO_YEAR_CNT ,DUE_DATE ,ATT_FILE_NUM ,ITEM_RMK ,PR_NUM ,PR_SQ ,PB_BUYER_CD ) SELECT GATE_CD ,BUYER_CD ,BID_NUM ,TO_NUMBER(#{BID_CNT}) AS BID_CNT ,ITEM_SQ ,SYSDATE AS REG_DATE ,#{ses.userId} AS REG_USER_ID ,SYSDATE AS MOD_DATE ,#{ses.userId} AS MOD_USER_ID ,'0' AS DEL_FLAG ,PR_BUYER_CD ,PR_DEPT_CD ,PURCHASE_TYPE ,ITEM_CD ,ITEM_DESC ,ITEM_SPEC ,MAKER_CD ,MAKER_ART_NO ,ORIGIN_CD ,PR_QT ,UNIT_CD ,UNIT_PRC ,PR_AMT ,TCO_YEAR_CNT ,DUE_DATE ,ATT_FILE_NUM ,ITEM_RMK ,PR_NUM ,PR_SQ ,PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCBDDT WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND BID_CNT = #{ORI_BID_CNT} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'

INSERT INTO STOCBDAP ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , BID_NUM , BID_CNT , VENDOR_CD , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG ) SELECT HD.GATE_CD , HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , TO_NUMBER(#{BID_CNT}) AS BID_CNT , AP.VENDOR_CD , SYSDATE AS REG_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS REG_USER_ID , SYSDATE AS MOD_DATE , #{ses.userId} AS MOD_USER_ID , '0' AS DEL_FLAG FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (AP.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{ORI_BID_CNT} AND HD.CONT_TYPE1 = 'NC' -- 지명경쟁 AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0'

INSERT INTO STOCBDES ( GATE_CD ,BUYER_CD ,BID_NUM ,BID_CNT ,REG_DATE ,REG_USER_ID ,MOD_DATE ,MOD_USER_ID ,DEL_FLAG ,QTA_NUM ,QTA_AMT ,PRESUM_AMT ,APP_DOC_NUM ,APP_DOC_CNT ,SIGN_STATUS ,SIGN_DATE ,ESTM_PRC1_ENC ,ESTM_PRC2_ENC ,ESTM_PRC3_ENC ,ESTM_PRC4_ENC ,ESTM_PRC5_ENC ,ESTM_PRC6_ENC ,ESTM_PRC7_ENC ,ESTM_PRC8_ENC ,ESTM_PRC9_ENC ,ESTM_PRC10_ENC ,ESTM_PRC11_ENC ,ESTM_PRC12_ENC ,ESTM_PRC13_ENC ,ESTM_PRC14_ENC ,ESTM_PRC15_ENC ,ESTM_ENCKEY ,ESTM_CERTV ,ESTM_CERTNUM ,ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE ,ESTM_CONFIRM_TIME ,ESTM_PRC1 ,ESTM_PRC2 ,ESTM_PRC3 ,ESTM_PRC4 ,ESTM_PRC5 ,ESTM_PRC6 ,ESTM_PRC7 ,ESTM_PRC8 ,ESTM_PRC9 ,ESTM_PRC10 ,ESTM_PRC11 ,ESTM_PRC12 ,ESTM_PRC13 ,ESTM_PRC14 ,ESTM_PRC15 ,CHOIC_ESTM_PRC1 ,CHOIC_ESTM_PRC2 ,CHOIC_ESTM_PRC3 ,CHOIC_ESTM_PRC4 ,FINAL_ESTM_PRC ,ATT_FILE_NUM ,RMK ) SELECT GATE_CD ,BUYER_CD ,BID_NUM ,#{BID_CNT} ,REG_DATE ,REG_USER_ID ,MOD_DATE ,MOD_USER_ID ,DEL_FLAG ,QTA_NUM ,QTA_AMT ,PRESUM_AMT ,APP_DOC_NUM ,APP_DOC_CNT ,SIGN_STATUS ,SIGN_DATE ,ESTM_PRC1_ENC ,ESTM_PRC2_ENC ,ESTM_PRC3_ENC ,ESTM_PRC4_ENC ,ESTM_PRC5_ENC ,ESTM_PRC6_ENC ,ESTM_PRC7_ENC ,ESTM_PRC8_ENC ,ESTM_PRC9_ENC ,ESTM_PRC10_ENC ,ESTM_PRC11_ENC ,ESTM_PRC12_ENC ,ESTM_PRC13_ENC ,ESTM_PRC14_ENC ,ESTM_PRC15_ENC ,ESTM_ENCKEY ,ESTM_CERTV ,ESTM_CERTNUM ,ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE ,ESTM_CONFIRM_TIME ,ESTM_PRC1 ,ESTM_PRC2 ,ESTM_PRC3 ,ESTM_PRC4 ,ESTM_PRC5 ,ESTM_PRC6 ,ESTM_PRC7 ,ESTM_PRC8 ,ESTM_PRC9 ,ESTM_PRC10 ,ESTM_PRC11 ,ESTM_PRC12 ,ESTM_PRC13 ,ESTM_PRC14 ,ESTM_PRC15 ,CHOIC_ESTM_PRC1 ,CHOIC_ESTM_PRC2 ,CHOIC_ESTM_PRC3 ,CHOIC_ESTM_PRC4 ,FINAL_ESTM_PRC ,ATT_FILE_NUM ,RMK FROM STOCBDES WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND BID_CNT = #{ORI_BID_CNT} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'

INSERT INTO STOCBDES ( GATE_CD ,BUYER_CD ,BID_NUM ,BID_CNT ,REG_DATE ,REG_USER_ID ,MOD_DATE ,MOD_USER_ID ,DEL_FLAG ,QTA_NUM ,QTA_AMT ,PRESUM_AMT ,APP_DOC_NUM ,APP_DOC_CNT ,SIGN_STATUS ,SIGN_DATE ,ESTM_PRC1_ENC ,ESTM_PRC2_ENC ,ESTM_PRC3_ENC ,ESTM_PRC4_ENC ,ESTM_PRC5_ENC ,ESTM_PRC6_ENC ,ESTM_PRC7_ENC ,ESTM_PRC8_ENC ,ESTM_PRC9_ENC ,ESTM_PRC10_ENC ,ESTM_PRC11_ENC ,ESTM_PRC12_ENC ,ESTM_PRC13_ENC ,ESTM_PRC14_ENC ,ESTM_PRC15_ENC ,ESTM_ENCKEY ,ESTM_CERTV ,ESTM_CERTNUM ,ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE ,ESTM_CONFIRM_TIME ,ESTM_PRC1 ,ESTM_PRC2 ,ESTM_PRC3 ,ESTM_PRC4 ,ESTM_PRC5 ,ESTM_PRC6 ,ESTM_PRC7 ,ESTM_PRC8 ,ESTM_PRC9 ,ESTM_PRC10 ,ESTM_PRC11 ,ESTM_PRC12 ,ESTM_PRC13 ,ESTM_PRC14 ,ESTM_PRC15 ,CHOIC_ESTM_PRC1 ,CHOIC_ESTM_PRC2 ,CHOIC_ESTM_PRC3 ,CHOIC_ESTM_PRC4 ,FINAL_ESTM_PRC ,ATT_FILE_NUM ,RMK ) SELECT GATE_CD ,BUYER_CD ,#{BID_NUM} ,#{BID_CNT} ,REG_DATE ,REG_USER_ID ,MOD_DATE ,MOD_USER_ID ,DEL_FLAG ,QTA_NUM ,QTA_AMT ,PRESUM_AMT ,APP_DOC_NUM ,APP_DOC_CNT ,SIGN_STATUS ,SIGN_DATE ,ESTM_PRC1_ENC ,ESTM_PRC2_ENC ,ESTM_PRC3_ENC ,ESTM_PRC4_ENC ,ESTM_PRC5_ENC ,ESTM_PRC6_ENC ,ESTM_PRC7_ENC ,ESTM_PRC8_ENC ,ESTM_PRC9_ENC ,ESTM_PRC10_ENC ,ESTM_PRC11_ENC ,ESTM_PRC12_ENC ,ESTM_PRC13_ENC ,ESTM_PRC14_ENC ,ESTM_PRC15_ENC ,ESTM_ENCKEY ,ESTM_CERTV ,ESTM_CERTNUM ,ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE ,ESTM_CONFIRM_TIME ,ESTM_PRC1 ,ESTM_PRC2 ,ESTM_PRC3 ,ESTM_PRC4 ,ESTM_PRC5 ,ESTM_PRC6 ,ESTM_PRC7 ,ESTM_PRC8 ,ESTM_PRC9 ,ESTM_PRC10 ,ESTM_PRC11 ,ESTM_PRC12 ,ESTM_PRC13 ,ESTM_PRC14 ,ESTM_PRC15 ,CHOIC_ESTM_PRC1 ,CHOIC_ESTM_PRC2 ,CHOIC_ESTM_PRC3 ,CHOIC_ESTM_PRC4 ,FINAL_ESTM_PRC ,ATT_FILE_NUM ,RMK FROM STOCBDES WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BID_NUM = #{PRE_BID_NUM} AND BID_CNT = #{PRE_BID_CNT} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
mapper.select: SELECT HD.ANN_NO, HD.ANN_ITEM ,SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 7, 2) AS ANN_DATE ,getContTypeTxt(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE_TXT ,SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 1, 4) '년 ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 5, 2) '월 ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 7, 2) '일 ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 1, 2) || '시 ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 3, 2) '분' AS APP_END_DATE ,HD.BID_USER_ID, HD.EV_USER_ID ,HD.LIMIT_CRIT ,HD.PROM_CRIT ,HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, HD.BID_STATUS ,HD.CONT_TYPE1, HD.CONT_TYPE2, HD.CONT_TYPE3 ,HD.EI_NUM FROM STOCBDHD HD WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT}

SELECT GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'M014', VNGL.REG_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_TYPE_LOC , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP040', VNGL.BUSINESS_DIVISION, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUSINESS_DIVISION_LOC , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP063', VNGL.GROUP_YN, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS GROUP_YN_LOC , VNGL.VENDOR_CD , GETVENDORNAME(VNGL.GATE_CD, VNGL.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , VNGL.IRS_NO , VNGL.TEL_NO AS TEL_NO , VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM FROM STOCVNGL VNGL WHERE VNGL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND VNGL.PROGRESS_CD = 'E' AND NVL(VNGL.BLOCK_FLAG,'0') != '1' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STOCVNCM VNCM WHERE VNCM.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND VNCM.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD AND VNCM.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND VNCM.CONFIRM_FLAG = 'E' -- 거래요청고객사 (E=승인) AND VNCM.DEL_FLAG = '0')
AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD IN
#{node.VENDOR_CD}
AND UPPER(VNGL.VENDOR_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETVENDORNAME(#{ses.gateCd}, VNGL.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD IN
SELECT #{vendor}

SELECT EVIM.EV_ITEM_SUBJECT ,GETCOMCODE(EVIM.GATE_CD, (CASE EVIM.EV_ITEM_KIND_CD WHEN 'E' THEN 'M114' ELSE 'M113' END), EVIM.EV_ITEM_TYPE_CD, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS EV_ITEM_TYPE_NM ,EVIM.EV_ITEM_METHOD_CD ,EVIM.SCALE_TYPE_CD ,EVTD.WEIGHT ,EVTD.SORT_SQ ,EVIM.EV_ITEM_CONTENTS ,EVIM.EV_ITEM_KIND_CD ,EVTD.EV_ITEM_NUM ,EVIM.EV_ITEM_TYPE_CD ,EVIM.EV_ITEM_DIV_CD ,QTY_ITEM_CD ,(SELECT COUNT(GATE_CD) FROM STOCEVID WHERE GATE_CD = EVIM.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = EVIM.BUYER_CD AND EV_ITEM_NUM = EVIM.EV_ITEM_NUM AND DEL_FLAG ='0' ) AS SCALE_COUNT ,(SELECT TM.EV_TPL_SUBJECT FROM STOCEVTM TM WHERE TM.GATE_CD = EVTD.GATE_CD AND TM.BUYER_CD = EVTD.BUYER_CD AND TM.EV_TPL_NUM = EVTD.EV_TPL_NUM) AS EV_TPL_SUBJECT FROM STOCEVTD EVTD LEFT JOIN STOCEVIM EVIM ON (EVTD.GATE_CD = EVIM.GATE_CD AND EVTD.BUYER_CD = EVIM.BUYER_CD AND EVTD.EV_ITEM_NUM = EVIM.EV_ITEM_NUM) WHERE EVTD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND EVTD.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND EVTD.EV_TPL_NUM = #{EV_TPL_NUM} AND EVTD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND EVIM.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND EVIM.CREATE_TYPE_CD = 'S' ORDER BY EVTD.SORT_SQ

SELECT BDEV.EV_ITEM_SUBJECT ,GETCOMCODE(BDEV.GATE_CD, (CASE BDEV.EV_ITEM_KIND_CD WHEN 'E' THEN 'M114' ELSE 'M113' END), BDEV.EV_ITEM_TYPE_CD, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS EV_ITEM_TYPE_NM ,BDEV.EV_ITEM_METHOD_CD ,BDEV.SCALE_TYPE_CD ,BDEV.WEIGHT ,BDEV.SORT_SQ ,BDEV.EV_ITEM_CONTENTS ,BDEV.EV_ITEM_KIND_CD ,'' AS EV_ITEM_NUM ,BDEV.EV_ITEM_TYPE_CD ,BDEV.EV_ITEM_DIV_CD ,BDEV.QTY_ITEM_CD ,0 AS SCALE_COUNT ,(SELECT TM.EV_TPL_SUBJECT FROM STOCEVTM TM WHERE TM.GATE_CD = BDEV.GATE_CD AND TM.BUYER_CD = BDEV.BUYER_CD AND TM.EV_TPL_NUM = #{EV_TPL_NUM}) AS EV_TPL_SUBJECT ,BDEV.EI_NUM ,BDEV.EI_SQ FROM STOCBDEV BDEV WHERE BDEV.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BDEV.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND BDEV.EI_NUM = #{EI_NUM} AND BDEV.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY BDEV.SORT_SQ

SELECT EVID.EV_ID_ORDER ,EVID.EV_ID_CONTENTS ,EVID.EV_ID_SCORE ,'' AS EI_NUM ,'' AS EI_SQ ,'' AS EI_ID_SQ ,'U' AS INSERT_FLAG FROM STOCEVID EVID WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND EVID.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND EVID.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND EVID.EV_ITEM_NUM = #{EV_ITEM_NUM} ORDER BY EVID.EV_ID_ORDER

SELECT EVID.EV_ID_ORDER ,EVID.EV_ID_CONTENTS ,EVID.FROM_VALUE ,EVID.FROM_CONDITION_CD ,EVID.TO_VALUE ,EVID.TO_CONDITION_CD ,EVID.EV_ID_SCORE ,'' AS EI_NUM ,'' AS EI_SQ ,'' AS EI_ID_SQ ,'U' AS INSERT_FLAG FROM STOCEVID EVID WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND EVID.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND EVID.EV_ITEM_NUM = #{EV_ITEM_NUM} ORDER BY EVID.EV_ID_ORDER

SELECT BDEI.EV_ID_ORDER ,BDEI.EV_ID_CONTENTS ,BDEI.EV_ID_SCORE ,BDEI.FROM_VALUE ,BDEI.FROM_CONDITION_CD ,BDEI.TO_VALUE ,BDEI.TO_CONDITION_CD ,BDEI.EV_ID_SCORE ,BDEI.EI_NUM ,BDEI.EI_SQ ,BDEI.EI_ID_SQ ,'U' AS INSERT_FLAG FROM STOCBDEI BDEI WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BDEI.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND BDEI.EI_NUM = #{EI_NUM} AND BDEI.EI_SQ = #{EI_SQ_RT} AND DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY BDEI.EV_ID_ORDER
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCBDEI ( GATE_CD ,BUYER_CD ,EI_NUM ,EI_SQ ,EI_ID_SQ ,REG_DATE ,REG_USER_ID ,MOD_DATE ,MOD_USER_ID ,DEL_FLAG ,EV_ID_ORDER ,EV_ID_CONTENTS ,EV_ID_SCORE ,FROM_VALUE ,FROM_CONDITION_CD ,TO_VALUE ,TO_CONDITION_CD )(SELECT EVID.GATE_CD ,EVID.BUYER_CD ,#{EI_NUM} ,#{EI_SQ} ,EVID.EV_ID_SQ ,SYSDATE ,#{ses.userId} ,SYSDATE ,#{ses.userId} ,'0' ,EVID.EV_ID_ORDER ,EVID.EV_ID_CONTENTS ,EVID.EV_ID_SCORE ,EVID.FROM_VALUE ,EVID.FROM_CONDITION_CD ,EVID.TO_VALUE ,EVID.TO_CONDITION_CD FROM STOCEVID EVID WHERE EVID.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND EVID.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND EVID.EV_ITEM_NUM = #{EV_ITEM_NUM} AND EVID.DEL_FLAG = '0')
mapper.select:
SELECT HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT , PG.VOTE_CNT ,getBuyerNames(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, 'BID', HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, null, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , HD.ANN_NO ,(CASE WHEN HD.BID_STATUS IN ('2303', '2330') THEN '[취소]' || HD.ANN_ITEM ELSE HD.ANN_ITEM END ) AS ANN_ITEM , HD.ANN_DATE , HD.CONT_TYPE1 , HD.CONT_TYPE2 , HD.CONT_TYPE3 , SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE, 7, 2) ' ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_TIME, 1, 2) ':' SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_TIME, 3, 2) AS APP_BEGIN_DATETIME , SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 7, 2) ' ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 1, 2) ':' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 3, 2) AS APP_END_DATETIME ,getBidAppProgressCd(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, 'CD') AS BID_STATUS ,getBidAppProgressCd(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, 'LOC') AS BID_STATUS_LOC , HD.BID_STATUS AS ORI_BID_STATUS , HD.BID_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS BID_USER_NM , HD.SIGN_STATUS ,(CASE WHEN HD.ESTM_TYPE IN ('SE', 'PE') THEN (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(ES.BID_CNT) AS NON_FINISH_CNT FROM STOCBDES ES WHERE ES.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND ES.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND ES.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND ES.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND ES.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NOT NULL AND ES.DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) ELSE 'Y' END) AS ESTM_FINISH_FLAG , PG.PERIOD_MOD_DATE , PG.PERIOD_MOD_RSN FROM STOCBDHD HD LEFT JOIN STOCBDPG PG ON (HD.GATE_CD = PG.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = PG.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = PG.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = PG.BID_CNT AND PG.VOTE_CNT = (SELECT MAX(VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDPG WHERE GATE_CD = PG.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = PG.BUYER_CD AND BID_NUM = PG.BID_NUM AND BID_CNT = PG.BID_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0')) WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND HD.BID_STATUS NOT IN ('1300', '2303', '9999') -- 유찰, 취소공고작성중, 취소공고완료된 이전차수 입찰건 제외 AND TO_NUMBER(HD.BID_STATUS) < 2350 AND HD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND ((TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') >= HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < HD.APP_END_DATE) OR (TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') >= HD.APP_END_DATE OR HD.BID_STATUS IN ('2350','2353','2363')))
AND HD.APP_END_DATE >= #{APP_END_FROM} AND HD.APP_END_DATE <= #{APP_END_TO}
AND getBidAppProgressCd(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, 'CD') = #{BID_STATUS}
AND HD.BID_USER_ID = #{BID_USER_ID}
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BID_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BID_USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(HD.ANN_NO) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{ANN_NO}) '%'
AND UPPER(REPLACE(HD.ANN_ITEM, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{ANN_ITEM}, ' ', '')) '%'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STOCBDDT DT WHERE DT.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND DT.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND DT.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND DT.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT
AND UPPER(DT.PR_BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(getCustName(DT.GATE_CD, DT.PR_BUYER_CD)) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND DT.DEL_FLAG = '0')
ORDER BY HD.APP_END_DATE, HD.APP_END_TIME

SELECT HD.GATE_CD , HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT , HD.BID_STATUS AS ORI_BID_STATUS ,getBidAppProgressCd(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, 'CD') AS BID_STATUS ,(CASE WHEN HD.ESTM_TYPE IN ('SE', 'PE') THEN (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(ES.BID_CNT) AS NON_FINISH_CNT FROM STOCBDES ES WHERE ES.GATE_CD = HD.GATE_CD AND ES.BUYER_CD = HD.BUYER_CD AND ES.BID_NUM = HD.BID_NUM AND ES.BID_CNT = HD.BID_CNT AND ES.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NOT NULL AND ES.DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) ELSE 'Y' END) AS ESTM_FINISH_FLAG FROM STOCBDHD HD WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{S_BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND HD.BID_STATUS NOT IN ('1300', '2303', '9999') AND TO_NUMBER(HD.BID_STATUS) < 2350 AND HD.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND ((TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') >= HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < HD.APP_END_DATE) OR (TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') >= HD.APP_END_DATE OR HD.BID_STATUS IN ('2350','2353','2363')))

SELECT HD.ANN_NO, HD.ANN_ITEM ,SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(HD.ANN_DATE, 7, 2) AS ANN_DATE ,getContTypeTxt(HD.GATE_CD, HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TYPE_TXT ,SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 1, 4) '년 ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 5, 2) '월 ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_DATE, 7, 2) '일 ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 1, 2) || '시 ' SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 3, 2) '분' AS APP_END_DATE ,HD.BID_USER_ID, HD.EV_USER_ID ,HD.LIMIT_CRIT ,HD.PROM_CRIT ,HD.BUYER_CD, HD.BID_NUM, HD.BID_CNT, HD.BID_STATUS ,HD.CONT_TYPE1, HD.CONT_TYPE2, HD.CONT_TYPE3 ,HD.EI_NUM FROM STOCBDHD HD WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT}

SELECT A.VENDOR_CD, A.VENDOR_NM, A.CEO_USER_NM ,A.APP_DATETIME ,A.GUAR_CNT, A.BID_GUAR_TYPE, A.GUARANTEER, A.GUAR_ATT_FILE_NUM ,(SUBSTR(A.GUAR_NUM, 7, 18), '') AS GUAR_NUM ,A.GUAR_REQ_NUM ,A.UNT_FLAG, A.ACHV_FLAG, A.FINAL_FLAG ,A.INCO_REASON, A.ATT_FILE_NUM, A.ATT_FILE_CNT ,A.BUYER_CD, A.BID_NUM, A.BID_CNT, A.ESTM_TYPE ,A.GUAR_AMT_CERTV, A.IRS_NO, A.VID_RANDOM ,(CASE WHEN A.APP_ATT_FILE_CNT = 0 THEN NULL ELSE A.APP_ATT_FILE_CNT END) AS APP_ATT_FILE_CNT, A.APP_ATT_FILE_NUM ,A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM, A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM, A.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL, A.PR_AMT, A.BID_AMT, A.ESTM_PRC_AMT ,(CASE WHEN A.ESTM_TYPE IN ('SE') THEN (CASE WHEN A.BID_AMT IS NOT NULL THEN (CASE WHEN A.ESTM_PRC_AMT < A.BID_AMT THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) ELSE '' END) ELSE '' END) AS ESTM_AMT_OVER_FLAG ,(CASE WHEN A.BID_AMT IS NOT NULL THEN (CASE WHEN A.PR_AMT < A.BID_AMT THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) ELSE '' END) AS PR_AMT_OVER_FLAG FROM ( SELECT AP.VENDOR_CD, GETVENDORNAME(AP.GATE_CD, AP.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM ,VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM ,(CASE WHEN AP.APP_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(AP.APP_DATE, 1, 4) '-' SUBSTR(AP.APP_DATE, 5, 2) '-' SUBSTR(AP.APP_DATE, 7, 2) ' ' SUBSTR(AP.APP_TIME, 1, 2) ':' SUBSTR(AP.APP_TIME, 3, 2) ELSE '-' END) AS APP_DATETIME ,(CASE WHEN (AP.BID_GUAR_TYPE, 'T') = 'F' THEN (CASE WHEN AP.GUAR_ATT_FILE_NUM IS NULL THEN '' ELSE TO_CHAR(GETFILECOUNT(AP.GATE_CD, AP.GUAR_ATT_FILE_NUM)) END) ELSE '' END) AS GUAR_CNT ,AP.UNT_FLAG ,AP.ACHV_FLAG ,AP.FINAL_FLAG ,AP.INCO_REASON ,AP.ATT_FILE_NUM, getFileCount(AP.GATE_CD, AP.ATT_FILE_NUM) AS ATT_FILE_CNT ,AP.BID_GUAR_TYPE, AP.GUARANTEER, AP.GUAR_ATT_FILE_NUM, AP.GUAR_NUM, AP.GUAR_REQ_NUM ,AP.BUYER_CD, AP.BID_NUM, AP.BID_CNT ,AP.GUAR_AMT_CERTV ,AP.VID_RANDOM ,REPLACE(VNGL.IRS_NO, '-', '') AS IRS_NO ,AP.APP_ATT_FILE_NUM, getFileCount(AP.GATE_CD, AP.APP_ATT_FILE_NUM) AS APP_ATT_FILE_CNT ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM ,AP.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL AS VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL ,HD.BID_STATUS ,HD.ESTM_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN HD.CONT_TYPE2 = 'QE' THEN ((HD.BASIC_AMT, HD.PR_AMT), 0) ELSE (HD.PR_AMT, 0) END) AS PR_AMT , (GETDECPERSONALINFO(ES.ESTM_PRC1_ENC), 0) AS ESTM_PRC_AMT ,(CASE WHEN ((AP.FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600' OR (AP.EV_FINAL_FLAG, '100') = '600') THEN NULL ELSE (CASE WHEN VO.BID_AMT_ENC IS NOT NULL THEN ((VO.BID_AMT_ENC, 0) + (VO.TCO_AMT_ENC, 0)) ELSE NULL END) END) AS BID_AMT FROM STOCBDHD HD JOIN STOCBDAP AP ON (HD.GATE_CD = AP.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = AP.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = AP.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = AP.BID_CNT AND AP.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (AP.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) LEFT JOIN STOCBDVO VO ON (AP.GATE_CD = VO.GATE_CD AND AP.BUYER_CD = VO.BUYER_CD AND AP.BID_NUM = VO.BID_NUM AND AP.BID_CNT = VO.BID_CNT AND AP.VENDOR_CD = VO.VENDOR_CD AND VO.VOTE_CNT = '1' AND (VO.BID_AMT_ENC, 0) > 0 AND VO.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCBDES ES ON (HD.GATE_CD = ES.GATE_CD AND HD.BUYER_CD = ES.BUYER_CD AND HD.BID_NUM = ES.BID_NUM AND HD.BID_CNT = ES.BID_CNT AND ES.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ES.ESTM_CONFIRM_DATE IS NOT NULL) WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} AND HD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A ORDER BY A.APP_DATETIME, A.VENDOR_NM

SELECT CODD.CODE, CODD.CODE_DESC FROM STOCCODH CODH LEFT JOIN STOCCODD CODD ON (CODH.GATE_CD = CODD.GATE_CD AND CODH.CODE_TYPE = CODD.CODE_TYPE AND CODH.LANG_CD = CODD.LANG_CD) WHERE CODH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CODH.CODE_TYPE = #{CODE_TYPE} AND CODH.LANG_CD = #{LANG_CD} AND CODD.USE_FLAG = '1' AND CODH.USE_FLAG = '1' AND CODD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CODH.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY
TO_NUMBER(CODD.SORT_SQ)
CAST(CODD.SORT_SQ AS INT)
, UPPER(CODD.CODE_DESC)

SELECT A.BUYER_CD , A.BID_NUM , A.BID_CNT , A.ORI_BID_CNT , PG.VOTE_CNT , A.ANN_NO , A.ANN_DATE , A.ANN_ITEM , A.CONT_TEXT1 || ' / ' || A.CONT_TEXT2 || ' / ' || A.CONT_TEXT3 AS CONT_TEXT , A.CONT_TYPE2 , A.APP_BEGIN_DATE, A.APP_BEGIN_TIME, A.APP_BEGIN_MIN , A.APP_END_DATE, A.APP_END_TIME, A.APP_END_MIN , PG.BID_BEGIN_DATE , SUBSTR(PG.BID_BEGIN_TIME, 1, 2) AS BID_BEGIN_TIME , SUBSTR(PG.BID_BEGIN_TIME, 3, 2) AS BID_BEGIN_MIN , PG.BID_END_DATE , SUBSTR(PG.BID_END_TIME, 1, 2) AS BID_END_TIME , SUBSTR(PG.BID_END_TIME, 3, 2) AS BID_END_MIN , PG.OPEN_DATE , SUBSTR(PG.OPEN_TIME, 1, 2) AS OPEN_TIME , SUBSTR(PG.OPEN_TIME, 3, 2) AS OPEN_MIN , A.ATT_FILE_NUM FROM ( SELECT HD.GATE_CD , HD.BUYER_CD , HD.BID_NUM , HD.BID_CNT , HD.BID_CNT AS ORI_BID_CNT , HD.ANN_NO , HD.ANN_DATE , HD.ANN_ITEM ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M301', HD.CONT_TYPE1, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TEXT1 ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M302', HD.CONT_TYPE2, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TEXT2 ,GETCOMCODE(HD.GATE_CD, 'M303', HD.CONT_TYPE3, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_TEXT3 , HD.CONT_TYPE2 , HD.APP_BEGIN_DATE , SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_TIME, 1, 2) AS APP_BEGIN_TIME , SUBSTR(HD.APP_BEGIN_TIME, 3, 2) AS APP_BEGIN_MIN , HD.APP_END_DATE , SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 1, 2) AS APP_END_TIME , SUBSTR(HD.APP_END_TIME, 3, 2) AS APP_END_MIN , HD.ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCBDHD HD WHERE HD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND HD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND HD.BID_NUM = #{BID_NUM} AND HD.BID_CNT = #{BID_CNT} ) A LEFT JOIN STOCBDPG PG ON (PG.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND PG.BUYER_CD = A.BUYER_CD AND PG.BID_NUM = A.BID_NUM AND PG.BID_CNT = A.ORI_BID_CNT) WHERE PG.VOTE_CNT = (SELECT MAX(P.VOTE_CNT) FROM STOCBDPG P WHERE P.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND P.BUYER_CD = A.BUYER_CD AND P.BID_NUM = A.BID_NUM AND P.BID_CNT = A.ORI_BID_CNT AND P.DEL_FLAG = '0')
